summary: Comprehensive testing of Stumpr application completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with excellent user experience. All core features working including authentication, patient form with 5 sections, LPPR component search, PDF export, and share functionality.

integration_issues.issue: Share link shows 'Lien de partage non trouvé' when accessed directly
integration_issues.details: Share link creation works in backend and frontend, but accessing the shared URL fails. Possible routing or URL format issue.

passed_tests: LPPR component search autocomplete (GET /api/lppr/search?q=genou - returns 8 Airtable results)
Patient form loads with all 5 sections (identity, amputation, prosthetic components, medical follow-up, daily activities)
Component search autocomplete works with dropdown results
Save patient functionality works (URL changes to edit mode)
All form fields functional and fillable
Authentication flow complete (register → login → patient form)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (core functionality working, minor share access issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix shared patient view access issue: Share links are created successfully but accessing them shows 'Lien de partage non trouvé'. Check routing configuration for /partage/{share_id} URLs and ensure SharedViewPage component is properly handling the share_id parameter.
